ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the tournament (e.g., round-robin, knockout) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the match belongs to */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the match was played */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the match was played */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season the match was played */,
  "match_number" TEXT /* Match number in the tournament */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue where the match was played */,
  "toss_winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the toss */,
  "toss_decision" TEXT /* Decision made by the toss winner (e.g., bat, field) */,
  "super_over" TEXT /* Whether the match went to a super over */,
  "winning_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning team */,
  "won_by" TEXT /* Method by which the match was won (e.g., wickets, runs) */,
  "margin" INTEGER /* Margin by which the match was won */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method of winning (e.g., none) */,
  "player_of_match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player of the match */,
  "umpire1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first umpire */,
  "umpire2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second umpire */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., completed, abandoned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_umpire1_id FOREIGN KEY ("umpire1_id") REFERENCES umpires ("umpire_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_umpire2_id FOREIGN KEY ("umpire2_id") REFERENCES umpires ("umpire_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_player_of_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_of_match_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_toss_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("toss_winner_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_winning_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("winning_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Owner of the team */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Coach of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player (e.g., batsman, bowler, all-rounder) */,
  "batting_style" TEXT /* Batting style of the player (e.g., right-handed, left-handed) */,
  "bowling_style" TEXT /* Bowling style of the player (e.g., right-arm fast, left-arm spin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the venue is located */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "umpires" (
  "umpire_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each umpire */,
  "umpire_name" TEXT /* Name of the umpire */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Experience of the umpire in years */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("umpire_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_statistics" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "runs_scored" INTEGER /* Runs scored by the team */,
  "wickets_fallen" INTEGER /* Wickets fallen by the team */,
  "overs_bowled" TEXT /* Overs bowled by the team */,
  "runs_conceded" INTEGER /* Runs conceded by the team */,
  "wickets_taken" INTEGER /* Wickets taken by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id", "team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "runs_scored" INTEGER /* Runs scored by the player */,
  "balls_faced" INTEGER /* Balls faced by the player */,
  "wickets_taken" INTEGER /* Wickets taken by the player */,
  "overs_bowled" TEXT /* Overs bowled by the player */,
  "runs_conceded" INTEGER /* Runs conceded by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id", "player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, coach, administrator) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the user (e.g., view_matches, edit_teams) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "permission")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_versions" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the match data */,
  "match_data" TEXT /* Match data in JSON format */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the match data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id", "version_number")
)
